info.name: MyAssetsHub — Property API v1
info.description:
# MyAssetsHub Property API

**Framework:** CodeIgniter 4 | **DB:** MySQL

## Authentication
All write endpoints require a Bearer token:
```
Authorization: Bearer {{api_token}}
```

## Base URL
```
{{base_url}}/api/v1
```

## Folder Structure
- 🔐 Auth Validation
- 🏷️ Categories
- 🏠 Properties — CRUD
- 🖼️ Property Images
- 📄 Property Documents
- 🎬 Property Videos
- 📐 Property Layouts
- ❌ Error Scenarios

## Auto-captured Variables
After running **Add Property**, the collection auto-saves:
- `property_l_id` — used by all sub-resource requests
- `property_code` — property code returned
- `img_id`, `doc_id`, `vid_id`, `layout_id` — from respective upload calls

## Response Time SLA
All endpoints must respond within **3000ms** (configurable via `response_time_limit` env var).
